hero_subtitle: Interactive flashcards, smart quizzes, AI hand gesture recognition, and a global leaderboard — all in one platform.
features_sub: Everything your child needs to learn effectively and joyfully
feat_gesture_desc: Turn on your webcam and answer by holding up fingers. Clench fist to confirm, 👍 to continue.
feat_images_desc: Pixar-quality 3D cinematic images for every vocabulary word — helping kids remember better.
feat_leaderboard_desc: Compete with friends worldwide. Leaderboard resets every week.
feat_progress_desc: Parents can easily manage child profiles and view detailed learning reports.
feat_pronunciation_desc: Listen to natural pronunciation for every word. Learn to speak correctly from the start.
feat_sound_desc: Celebratory sound effects for correct answers — fanfare, arpeggio, and melody.
subjects_sub: Multiple subjects, many topics — enriching every day
